body.title: CLOSED: Document interface library pros/cons in SWADL README
body.result: README Interface Support section expanded with comparison table, when-to-use prose, tradeoffs, 3283028
body.description:
Update README.md with a comparison table and prose covering when to use each supported interface library: Selenium, Playwright, pyautogui, dogtail. Tradeoffs: browser vs desktop, accessibility-tree vs coordinate-based, Linux vs cross-platform, AT-SPI coverage gaps.

**Affected files:** swadl/README.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** README only; no code changes
**Test plan:** no tests — doc change; review for accuracy against the actual driver implementations
